query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `budget_estimates` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`totalBudget` decimal(12,2),
	`lineItems` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `budget_estimates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `characters` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`role` varchar(100),
	`description` text,
	`portraitUrl` text,
	`traits` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `characters_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `chat_messages` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int,
	`role` enum('user','assistant') NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`metadata` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `chat_messages_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `credit_transactions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`amount` int NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('earn','spend','refund','bonus') NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `credit_transactions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projects` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`genre` varchar(100),
	`logline` text,
	`status` enum('draft','in_progress','completed','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`thumbnailUrl` text,
	`metadata` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `projects_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `referrals` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`referrerId` int NOT NULL,
	`referredId` int NOT NULL,
	`creditsAwarded` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `referrals_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `scenes` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`sceneNumber` int NOT NULL,
	`location` varchar(255),
	`timeOfDay` varchar(50),
	`characters` json,
	`videoUrl` text,
	`thumbnailUrl` text,
	`status` enum('draft','generating','ready','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `scenes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `scripts` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`content` text,
	`version` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `scripts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `shot_lists` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`sceneId` int,
	`content` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `shot_lists_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `storyboard_panels` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`sceneId` int,
	`panelNumber` int NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`imageUrl` text,
	`cameraAngle` varchar(100),
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `storyboard_panels_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `team_members` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`role` enum('owner','director','writer','editor','viewer') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'viewer',
	`invitedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `team_members_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `videos` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int,
	`sceneId` int,
	`prompt` text,
	`videoUrl` text,
	`thumbnailUrl` text,
	`duration` int,
	`status` enum('generating','ready','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'generating',
	`type` enum('clip','trailer','film') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'clip',
	`creditsUsed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `videos_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `credits` int DEFAULT 100 NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionTier` enum('free','amateur','independent','creator','studio','industry') DEFAULT 'free' NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `referralCode` varchar(16);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `referredBy` int;
